description: Cross-language contract test fixture for the subagent status field. The backend stamps ToolMessage.additional_kwargs.subagent_status using these prefixes; the frontend reads the structured field and falls back to the same prefixes. Both sides' tests load this file and must agree.

cases.name: succeeded
cases.content: Task Succeeded. Result: investigated and produced a 3-page report

cases.name: failed
cases.content: Task failed. Error: underlying tool raised RuntimeError

cases.name: polling_timed_out
cases.content: Task polling timed out after 15 minutes. This may indicate the background task is stuck. Status: RUNNING

cases.name: polling_timed_out_other_n
cases.content: Task polling timed out after 1 minutes. Status: RUNNING

cases.name: pre_unknown_subagent
cases.origin: task_tool.py pre-execution Error path (unknown subagent type)
cases.content: Error: Unknown subagent type 'foo'. Available: bash, general-purpose

cases.name: pre_bash_disabled
cases.origin: task_tool.py pre-execution Error path (host bash disabled)
cases.content: Error: Host bash subagent is disabled by configuration

cases.name: pre_task_disappeared
cases.origin: task_tool.py pre-execution Error path (background task disappeared)
cases.content: Error: Task 1234 disappeared from background tasks

cases.name: wrapper_error
cases.content: Error: Tool 'task' failed with TypeError: 'AsyncCallbackManager' object is not iterable. Continue with available context, or choose an alternative tool.
